urodziny_subtitle: Birthday package – playtime in the play area with a mascot and workshops
birthday_rule_days: Birthdays are held Monday through Sunday. Duration: 2.5 hours.
birthday_rule_duration: On weekdays, hours are arranged individually.
birthday_rule_weekday_hours: On weekends, parties are held at designated times (see below).
birthday_rule_weekend_hours: Exceeding the time limit incurs an additional fee according to the price list.
birthday_rule_playground: The play area is for children up to 130 cm tall.
birthday_rule_food: Bringing food and drinks from outside the birthday room is not allowed.
birthday_rule_organizer: The birthday organizer is responsible for participating children.
birthday_pakiet_1_features: 2.5 h playtime in the play area|Colorful table setting|Sparkling drink for children|Mascot visit|Gift for the birthday child (play area invitation)|Workshop: face painting or balloon twisting
birthday_pakiet_2_features: 2.5 h playtime in the play area|Colorful table setting|Sparkling drink for children|Mascot visit|Gift for the birthday child (play area invitation)|Workshop: cookie baking or making Italian pizza with tasting
birthday_wariant_1_items: Breadsticks|Flavored crisps|Popcorn|Meringues|Cake pops|Unlimited drinks (water, apple juice, orange juice)
birthday_wariant_2_items: Breadsticks|Flavored crisps|Popcorn|Meringues|Cake pops|Fruit cups (1 portion/child)|Unlimited drinks
birthday_wariant_3_items: Grissini|Corn crisps|Popcorn|Lentil crisps|Fruit cups|Cake pops|Fruit-yogurt jelly|Unlimited drinks (fruit-infused water, compote)
birthday_extra_muffinka_mala: Small muffin with powdered sugar (min. 12 pcs.)
urodziny_tables_hint: We encourage you to explore our sweet and savory table offerings:
katering_subtitle: Catering for birthdays, christenings, communions, and other celebrations. Contact: cafeslodziak@gmail.com
catering_cake_included: The set includes a cake: light sponge, mousse of your choice (raspberry, blackcurrant, strawberry), light mascarpone cream, white with pink and blue accents, inscription on fondant. Size adjusted to the number of guests.
catering_rule_children_3: Children up to 3 years – free (seat without food).
catering_rule_drinks: Orange juice, apple juice, and mineral water with lemon in pitchers – unlimited.
catering_rule_discount: 25% discount on hot drinks for the birthday person.
